lastReleaseMessage: E4 building HP bar -> ColorRect nodes (verified in running Skirmish); units/enemies keep drawn bar (numerous-entity best-practice)

barRaise.topFinding: The frozen week broke hard. HEAD moved eleven commits in one day, v0.58.42 to v0.58.53 (all 2026-06-21), and the motion landed real best-practices work the queue has wanted for a month: path-extends 6 to 3, enemy stats to Inspector-editable .tres Resources, the Command Post to Lantern rename across code and GDD, the world scaled to native 256px art, and a new Cowork-integrity preship layer (worktree-sanity, a reverted-decisions ledger, the FUSE git-blob rule). The ASSETS.md regen that sat stranded two days is committed, the tree is clean, and Rising.json no longer lies about it. But the velocity shipped two regressions the old preship missed: the E5 cast broke the enemy pool on a cold cache (v0.58.49, hotfixed v0.58.51), and the S7 bare-autoload conversion broke gameplay-scene compilation (v0.58.50, reverted v0.58.53). Both were caught the same evening and v0.58.52 added the gate that would have caught E5, so the loop self-corrected. The thing still not moving is M1: completion holds at 40% since 2026-06-10, twelve days, and not one of the eleven commits was a mechanics row. The release pipe is fast again; it is pointed at remediation, not the milestone.

actions.title: Run the remaining autoload/god-file bp refactors one at a time with a real-game boot between each; keep the v0.58.52 boot-the-real-game gate.
Land br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18 (two release.ps1 preship guards); eighth audit running, the durable closer for the footer and bare-message classes.
Make the next focused session an M1 mechanics row (Hold the Wall or between-mission save/load); M1 held at 40% for twelve days while effort went to remediation.
git rm --cached scripts/*.ps1.bak (makes the v0.57.8 gitignored claim true) and correct the building.gd header refs (v0.67.0 / v0.61.14 vs a v0.58.53 repo).
Rewrite the bare CHANGELOG entries v0.58.25-v0.58.42 to describe their work. Queued as br-changelog-bare-automsg-v05825-v05840-2026-06-18.
